title: Origins: Ethergeist
description: An origin that runs through walls and spooks everywhere.
body:
# 👻 Ethergeist **(Impact 1 Origin)** *Humanoid airheads who evolved spectrally, in contrast to their ghastly ancestors.* ## • Powerlist •
☁️ Spectral Steps Sprinting allows you to treat air like blocks, allowing you to run on nothing, and pass through blocks.
😵‍💫﻿ Spirited Your use of Spectral Steps is gradually decreases your Spook, and it increases when you stop sprinting. Your sprinting speed correlates how little Spook you have, faster when at higher amounts, and slower when at lower amounts.
🌍 Earthkissed You take no fall damage while sprinting.
💕 Pop You take double damage from projectiles, and you lose Spook based on the damage took when sprinting.
🦵Shadowy Shins You are extremely slippery on the ground, and much slower while not sprinting.
